mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET RESTOCK_INBOUNDED = 'Y', RESTOCK_INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, RESTOCK_INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, RESTOCK_INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblRestockWaitId}

UPDATE TBL_SO_P SET RESTOCK_INBOUNDED = 'Y', RESTOCK_INBOUND_DT = #{processDt}, RESTOCK_INBOUND_USER = #{processUser}, RESTOCK_INBOUND_TIME = GETDATE(), UPDT_USER = #{processUser}, UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() WHERE TBL_SO_P_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT SP.TBL_SO_P_ID as tblRestockWaitId, SM.TBL_SO_M_ID as tblSoMId, SM.AGNT_CD as agntCd, AG.AGNT_NM as agntNm, SM.SO_NO as soNo, SP.PROD_CD as prodCd, SP.PROD_NM as prodNm, SP.QTY as returnQty, ISNULL(PM.MTO_YN, 'N') as mtoYn, PM.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId FROM TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.TBL_SO_M_ID = SM.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AG WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.AGNT_CD = AG.AGNT_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M PM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD WHERE SP.TBL_SO_P_ID = #{tblSoPId}
SELECT TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, ISNULL(CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) as currentQty FROM TBL_MTRL_M WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CMPY_CD = 'A' AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{prodCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( 'A', #{agntCd}, #{agntNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{prodCd}, #{prodNm}, 'RESTOCK', #{currentQty}, #{returnQty}, #{afterQty}, '용인센터재입고-재고증가 (주문번호:' + #{soNo} + ', 반품수량:' + CAST(#{returnQty} AS VARCHAR) + ')', #{processDt}, GETDATE(), #{processUser}, GETDATE(), #{processUser}, 'N' )

INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ( CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN ) VALUES ( 'A', #{agntCd}, #{agntNm}, #{tblMtrlMId}, #{prodCd}, #{prodNm}, 'RESTOCK_REVERT', #{currentQty}, -CAST(#{returnQty} AS INT), #{afterQty}, '용인센터재입고취소-재고감소 (주문번호:' + #{soNo} + ', 반품수량:' + CAST(#{returnQty} AS VARCHAR) + ')', CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), GETDATE(), #{processUser}, GETDATE(), #{processUser}, 'N' )
